variants.title: Fleetguard AF25139M Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the Donaldson P185069
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25139M premium axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.

variants.title: Donaldson P185069 Air Filter Element - Main
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P185069 Air Filter Element - Main is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
